dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, cruel fate has dealt us a terrible hand. {quest_origin} brought {quest_threat_the} upon us, and now {quest_focus_the} {quest_focus_is} crumbling before our eyes.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: No one caused this on purpose. It is just bad luck, but {quest_stakes_the} will pay the price unless we {quest_action}. {quest_ally} heard that {quest_item} found {location_hint} might help us recover. We need as much as you can gather.
dialogueChunks.outro: We did nothing wrong and yet we suffer. Please help us fight back against this misfortune.

dialogueChunks.intro: It was not an attack, {player_name}. Just bad timing and {quest_threat_the}. {quest_focus_The} gave way and now {quest_stakes_the} {quest_stakes_is} cut off with no way to reach us.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need to {quest_action} before {quest_time_pressure}, or they will be stranded. Gather {quest_item} found {location_hint} for the repair. It is the only way to reconnect with {quest_stakes_the}.
dialogueChunks.outro: Those people cannot survive alone out there. Please hurry.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, {quest_threat_animate_the} from {quest_origin} scattered our supplies across the area. {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_is} buried in the debris and {quest_stakes_the} {quest_stakes_is} at risk.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need to {quest_action} before scavengers pick it clean. Recover as many {quest_item} as you can find {location_hint}. Every piece of it counts.
dialogueChunks.outro: Without {quest_stakes_the}, we face a long stretch with nothing. You would earn {quest_reward_hint} for helping.
